description: Painterly Art Deco style illustration. A man in profile, head bowed, wears a blue hard hat, a gray-blue jacket, and a yellow high-visibility vest. Behind him are golden geometric beams arranged in a sunburst pattern and blue marbled panels, in warm gold and blue light. The image is hand-painted with no photographic elements. At the bottom, centered white text reads 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV', above a small circular government seal. There is no slogan headline.
